title: Cozy Finds
description:
A cozy 3D spot-the-difference game set in a nostalgic ’90s office.

Cozy Finds is a take on the classic “spot-the-difference” game inside a single, detailed office frozen in time. Look for multiple differences in each room using the split-screen viewport. 

Spot the Difference in 3D
Freely rotate, zoom, and explore the office from every angle as you uncover subtle changes hidden in plain sight.

Relaxing, No-Pressure Gameplay
No timers. No way to lose. Just you, the space, and your attention to detail.

Cozy Vibes & Lofi Music
Perfect for unwinding—like staying at the office with nothing but humming of the screens and a good playlist.

Though it's not a huge game, I made this as my first full project and hope you enjoy it :)
description_short: Settle in and unwind with a cozy 3D spot-the-difference game. Rotate, zoom, and explore the charming miniature office as you search for every small change. No stress — just careful observation, good music, and satisfying discoveries.
